description: Style NoteThe crush-worthy, mood lifting colouring with updated design details in this top, fresh from sepia's design studio, is the season's summer essential. Style this with form fitting jeggings and ballet flats for a sweet, girly vibe. For a vintage feel, throw on a faded and worn denim jacket, tights and a floral scarf with this piece. Product detailsLavender tunic, has short sleeves with round neck collar, three large wood button placket, pin tucks along the front  and button embellishment on sleevesMaterial and Care 100% cottonRinse separatelyGentle handwash in mild detergentDo not bleach or scrub on embroidery & printLine dry inside outLow ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model( height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing size M
